thresholds.label: Healthy
thresholds.note: A healthy amount of screen time that leaves plenty of room for offline activities.

thresholds.label: Moderate
thresholds.note: Moderate screen time that is manageable but could be reduced.

thresholds.label: Elevated
thresholds.note: Elevated screen time that may begin to impact sleep and focus.

thresholds.label: Elevated
thresholds.note: High screen time with potential negative impacts on mental wellbeing.

thresholds.label: High risk
thresholds.note: Very high screen time strongly associated with digital fatigue.

thresholds.label: High risk
thresholds.note: Extreme screen time posing severe risks to physical and mental health.

thresholds.label: High risk
thresholds.note: Complete lack of social interaction is a severe risk factor for deep loneliness.

thresholds.label: High risk
thresholds.note: Extremely isolated lifestyle with very limited support network.

thresholds.label: Elevated
thresholds.note: Low level of social interaction that may lead to feelings of isolation.

thresholds.label: Moderate
thresholds.note: Moderate socialization that provides some connection but could be improved.

thresholds.label: Moderate
thresholds.note: Reasonable level of social interaction supporting general wellbeing.

thresholds.label: Healthy
thresholds.note: Good social engagement offering a strong protective buffer against stress.

thresholds.label: Healthy
thresholds.note: Excellent social integration and strong community ties.

thresholds.label: High risk
thresholds.note: Dangerous sleep deprivation drastically impairing cognitive and physical functions.

thresholds.label: High risk
thresholds.note: Severe lack of sleep with serious negative effects on daily mood and health.

thresholds.label: Elevated
thresholds.note: Significant sleep deficit leading to fatigue and reduced resilience.

thresholds.label: Moderate
thresholds.note: Slight sleep deprivation that may cause minor lethargy.

thresholds.label: Healthy
thresholds.note: Optimal sleep duration for full mental and physical recovery.

thresholds.label: Moderate
thresholds.note: Slight oversleeping that can sometimes disrupt normal circadian rhythms.

thresholds.label: Elevated
thresholds.note: Excessive sleep indicating potential underlying health or mood issues.

thresholds.label: High risk
thresholds.note: Extreme oversleeping strongly correlated with depression or physical illness.

thresholds.label: High risk
thresholds.note: Completely sedentary lifestyle with major risks for long-term health.

thresholds.label: Elevated
thresholds.note: Very low physical activity insufficient for maintaining cardiovascular health.

thresholds.label: Moderate
thresholds.note: Some activity present but below recommended levels for optimal health.

thresholds.label: Healthy
thresholds.note: Good routine of regular exercise supporting physical and mental health.

thresholds.label: Healthy
thresholds.note: Excellent level of physical activity providing maximum health benefits.
